title: Creamy Algerian Lamb Tagine
description: A rich and earthy Algerian dish featuring tender lamb in a creamy sauce, perfect for a family dinner. This recipe is kid-friendly and egg-free.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the lamb cubes and cook until they are browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots, ground cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Pour in 1 cup of water and bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours.
Stir in the full fat yogurt and continue to simmer, uncovered, for an additional 30 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened and the lamb is tender.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
